chunks.text: University of California at Berkeley Department of Electrical Engineering & Computer Sciences Instructional & Electronics Support Group /share/b/pub/director.help Jan 5, 2004 EECS Instruction owns 10 licenses for Direct

2004 EECS Instruction owns 10 licenses for Director 4.0 for Macintoshes. These were installed in 310 Davis prior to January 1998. They can be installed in 199 Cory if an instructor requests it for a class. Previously, Director was used by CS39A a
a class. Previously, Director was used by CS39A and CS294. Questions to "inst@eecs.berkeley.edu". EECS Instructional & Electronics Support Group 384/386 & 377 Cory, 333 Soda
